channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania Reaches Staff-Level Agreement with IMF for Additional Funding as Kenya's New Programme Talks Remain Inconclusive
item.description: Tanzania has secured a staff-level agreement with the International Monetary Fund (IMF) for the completion of reviews under its Extended Credit Facility and Resilience and Sustainability Facility. Thi...

item.title: Concerns Over GOP Policies Impacting Children and Education
item.description: The article critically examines recent actions and policies by the Republican Party under former President Donald Trump, highlighting concerns about their impact on children, families, and education. ...

item.title: Chuck Norris’ First Starring Role in 'Breaker! Breaker!' (1977)
item.description: In 1977, Chuck Norris made a pivotal career move by taking on his first leading role in the action film 'Breaker! Breaker!'. Directed by Don Hulette and released by American Cinema Productions, the mo...

item.title: Telangana issues heatwave advisory with safety measures and warning signs for heat-related illness
item.description: The Telangana Health Department has issued a fresh advisory warning citizens about the risks of heat-related illnesses as temperatures across the State are expected to rise further in the coming days....

item.title: Pune Botany Teacher Arrested by CBI Over NEET-UG 2026 Paper Leak
item.description: The Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) has apprehended a Pune-based botany teacher, Manisha Gurunath Mandhare, in connection with the alleged leak of the 2026 NEET-UG examination papers. Mandhare, ...

item.title: Highlights and Insights from the 2026 Tour of Luzon
item.description: The 2026 MPTC Tour of Luzon has successfully wrapped up after 14 challenging stages covering over 1,800 kilometers across the island of Luzon. Thirteen teams participated in the event, showcasing both...

item.title: SNL Season Finale Features Controversial Trump-Epstein Sketch
item.description: The season finale of Saturday Night Live featured a controversial sketch in which actor Will Ferrell portrayed the ghost of Jeffrey Epstein, drawing attention for a dark joke referencing Epstein's 201...

item.title: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DRC and Uganda a global health emergency
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has officially declared the recent outbreak of a rare Ebola strain in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) and Uganda a public health emergency of internation...

item.title: Straight Womanhood: Misconceptions and Contemporary Perspectives
item.description: Phoebe Maltz Bovy’s article addresses the persistent misconceptions surrounding straight women’s desires and identities in modern culture. She reflects on the media response to Lindy West’s memoir, 'A...

item.title: Review of Auguste, an Italian Small Plates Restaurant in Hackney
item.description: Auguste is a newly opened Italian restaurant in Hackney, east London, occupying the former Papi site. The 32-seater space has been revamped with white tablecloths and a focus on small plates inspired ...

item.title: Iran Advocates for Legal Protections and Nuclear Rights at NPT Review Conference
item.description: At the ongoing Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty (NPT) Review Conference, Iran has submitted several working papers emphasizing the importance of safeguarding nuclear facilities, legal accountability f...

item.title: Michael Carrick Confirmed as Permanent Manchester United Manager After Interim Success
item.description: Michael Carrick has officially secured a long-term contract to continue as the manager of Manchester United after impressing during his caretaker spell. Appointed on an interim basis in January 2026 f...

item.title: Trump Considers Operation to Seize Iran's Enriched Uranium Despite Official Warnings
item.description: According to a report by Zeteo, President Donald Trump is reportedly preparing to authorize a high-risk operation aimed at seizing Iran's enriched uranium. While Trump has previously pursued regime ch...

item.title: Analysis of N800 Billion Alleged Misappropriation by APC Governors’ Forum

item.title: Ukraine launches drone strikes in Russia, resulting in four deaths according to Moscow
item.description: On May 17, 2026, Moscow authorities reported that a mass drone assault conducted by Ukrainian forces resulted in the deaths of four individuals in Russia. The drone barrage represents an escalation in...

item.title: Lea Salonga celebrates her son Nic Chien’s 20th birthday
item.description: Lea Salonga, the internationally acclaimed singer and actress, recently celebrated a milestone in her family as her son, Nic Chien, turned 20 years old. Known for her illustrious career in theatre and...

item.title: Understanding Why You Get Winded Climbing Stairs and How to Improve
item.description: Feeling out of breath after climbing stairs is a common experience for people of all ages and fitness levels. Medical experts explain that this is often a normal physiological response because stair c...

item.title: EFCC arraigns Blessing CEO over ₦36 million Lekki property fraud case
item.description: Na big wahala don land for social media influencer and self-proclaimed relationship therapist, Okoro Blessing Nkiruka, wey people sabi as Blessing CEO. EFCC don arraign her for Federal High Court, Iko...

item.title: Look Mum No Computer reacts to last-place finish at Eurovision 2026
item.description: The United Kingdom's 2026 Eurovision representative, Look Mum No Computer, has addressed the outcome of the competition after finishing last with the song 'Eins, Zwei, Drei'. The contest, held in Vien...
